% PCF-2 v1.2 candidate paragraph insert -- op:finer-cubic-split
% Generated by PCF2-SESSION-R1, 2026-05-01.

\paragraph{R1 finer-cubic-split probe (provisional).}
A catalogue-level rank-correlation battery against the residual
$\delta = A_{\mathrm{fit}} - 6$ over the 50 cubic families
(Sessions B and C1) was run with twelve invariants of the cubic
$b(n) = \alpha_3 n^3 + \alpha_2 n^2 + \alpha_1 n + \alpha_0$:
$\sgn(\alpha_3)$, $\sgn(\Delta_3)$, parity of $|\Delta_3|$,
$|\Delta_3| \bmod 8$, $|\Delta_3| \bmod 12$, $\log|\Delta_3|$,
the smallest prime divisor of $|\Delta_3|$, $\omega(|\Delta_3|)$,
the Galois group, $r_1$, $r_2$, and the squarefree part of the
quadratic resolvent (CM~bin only). Six further invariants
(conductor, $h$, $h^+$, regulator, fundamental-unit norm, and
unit density) were not computable in the available environment
and are recorded as NaN; they remain open for an R1.1 follow-up.

The strongest single-invariant signal is on $\log|\Delta_3|$:
Spearman $\rho = -0.451$, $p = 1.0 \times 10^{-3}$,
Bonferroni-corrected $p = 1.1\times 10^{-2}$ (m=11 valid tests),
Benjamini-Hochberg $q = 1.1\times 10^{-2}$. Excluding family~31
(which has $A_{\mathrm{stderr}} = 0.074$, an order of magnitude
above the catalogue median), the same test sharpens to
$\rho = -0.492$, $p = 3.3\times 10^{-4}$, Bonferroni $p = 3.7\times 10^{-3}$,
BH $q = 3.7\times 10^{-3}$: family~31 \emph{masks} rather than
drives the signal.

The weighting-by-$A_{\mathrm{stderr}}^{-2}$ sensitivity check
\emph{weakens} the $\log|\Delta_3|$ correlation
($|\rho|_{\mathrm{w}} = 0.26$), so part of the signal lives on
the loose-fit tail; precision-escalating the four families with
$A_{\mathrm{stderr}} > 5\times 10^{-3}$ (families~24, 30, 31, 37)
is the natural follow-up. Multi-invariant rank regression yields
adjusted $R^2 \le 0.22$ for any pair, indicating no second
catalogue invariant carries appreciable independent signal.

The R1 HALT condition (any single invariant with $|\rho|>0.6$ at
Bonferroni $p<10^{-3}$, which would warrant a Theorem-level
absorption) is \emph{not} met. We therefore retain Conjecture~B4
(sharp form $A = 2d = 6$ across all 50 cubic families) and flag
$\log|\Delta_3|$ as the candidate finer-cubic-split invariant
pending an R1.1 cycle that (a)~installs \texttt{pari/gp} and
adds the six number-field invariants, (b)~precision-escalates
the four loose-fit families, and (c)~extends the battery with
Mahler measure $M(b)$ and the genus of $y^2 = b(x)$.

% Notes-line update for the eventual PCF-2 Zenodo description:
% R1 finer-cubic-split probe completed 2026-05-01: borderline single-
% invariant signal on log|Delta_3| (Spearman rho=-0.45 to -0.49,
% Bonferroni p in [1.1e-2, 3.7e-3]); HALT not triggered; Conjecture B4
% retained; six pari/gp-only invariants and four loose-fit families
% deferred to R1.1.
